form.label: Network Conversations with Cisco ACI BD/Tenant Mapping

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20062` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (src_tenant_name=* OR dest_tenant_name=*) $ipv4_and_or_v6$ $blocked_flows$ | search $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | fillnull value=0 bytes_out bytes_in | eval bytes = bytes_in + bytes_out | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes) as sum_bytes by src_tenant_name src_ip src_port dest_ip dest_port transport _time | `dedup_timechart_events` | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes) by src_tenant_name,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

`netflow_search_rule_20062` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (src_tenant_name=* OR dest_tenant_name=*) $ipv4_and_or_v6$ $blocked_flows$ | search $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | fillnull value=0 bytes_out bytes_in | eval bytes = bytes_in + bytes_out | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes) as sum_bytes by dest_tenant_name src_ip src_port dest_ip dest_port transport _time | `dedup_timechart_events` | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes) by dest_tenant_name,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

`netflow_search_rule_20062` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (src_tenant_name=* OR dest_tenant_name=*) $ipv4_and_or_v6$ $blocked_flows$ (src_tenant_name=* OR dest_tenant_name=*) | fillnull src_tenant_name dest_tenant_name value="NULL" | search src_tenant_name!="NULL" AND dest_tenant_name!="NULL" AND src_tenant_name!=dest_tenant_name | search $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | strcat src_tenant_name ": " dest_tenant_name tenant_pair_name | fillnull value=0 bytes_out bytes_in | eval bytes = bytes_in + bytes_out | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes) as sum_bytes by tenant_pair_name src_ip src_port dest_ip dest_port transport _time | `dedup_timechart_events` | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes) by tenant_pair_name,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

`netflow_search_rule_20062` | eval bytes_total = bytes_in+bytes_out | stats sum(bytes_total) as bytes by src_tenant_name src_bd_name dest_bd_name | eval source = src_tenant_name." / ".src_bd_name, target = dest_bd_name | rename bytes as value | fields source target value | sort - value | head 200

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10062: Network Conversations” (syslogs with nfc_id=20062). This Module identifies and reports hosts with the most traffic (optionally all hosts). It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. For bidirectional flows the Module stitches request-reply flows inverting source and destination for flows in the opposite direction. It reports consolidated flows separating bytes/packets sent and bytes/packets received.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
